dashboard.scanPrompt: Scan your Mac to reclaim space.

cleanup.title: Storage & Cleanup
cleanup.subtitle: Free up space by removing system junk, large files, and duplicates.

settings.title: Settings
settings.resetConfirm: Are you sure? This will not delete your files, just app settings.

systemCleaner.title: System Junk
systemCleaner.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} system items? This cannot be undone.
systemCleaner.warning: These files are generally safe to delete, but clearing system caches may slow down your Mac temporarily while they rebuild. McClean protects critical files automatically.
systemCleaner.noJunk: No system junk found. Your Mac is clean!

largeFiles.title: Large Files
largeFiles.subtitle: Files larger than 100MB
largeFiles.noFiles: No large files found. Run a scan first.

duplicateFinder.title: Duplicate Finder
duplicateFinder.subtitle: Find and remove identical files to free up space.
duplicateFinder.scanPrompt: Scan your Home folder for duplicate files.

applications.title: Applications ({{count}})
applications.subtitle: Manage installed applications
applications.confirmUninstall: Are you sure you want to move "{{app}}" to Trash?
applications.foundAssociated: Found {{count}} associated files (plist, caches) that can also be deleted.
applications.confirmAssociated:
Do you want to delete the {{count}} associated files found?

{{files}}

homebrew.title: Homebrew Packages ({{count}})
homebrew.subtitle: Manage formulas and casks
homebrew.confirmUninstall: Uninstall Homebrew package "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

privacy.title: Privacy & Security
privacy.subtitle: Manage browser data and app permissions
privacy.appPermissionsDesc: Manage Camera, Mic, and Location access in System Settings

startup.title: Startup Items ({{count}})
startup.subtitle: Manage applications that start automatically
startup.noItems: No LaunchAgents found in your user library.

spaceLens.title: Space Lens
spaceLens.subtitle: Visualize your storage to see what's taking up space.
spaceLens.clickScan: Click 'Select Folder' to start the deep analysis.

folderAnalysis.title: Folder Analysis
folderAnalysis.subtitle: Select a folder to see how your space is distributed and find duplicate files.
folderAnalysis.noDuplicates: No duplicate files found in this folder.

smartAssistant.title: Smart Assistant Suggestions
smartAssistant.trashWarning: Your Trash is large ({{size}} GB). Consider emptying it.
smartAssistant.scanWarning: It's been {{days}} days since your last cleanup scan.
smartAssistant.neverScanned: You have never run a cleanup scan. Consider starting one.
